task_yaml.task:
I need today's official euro foreign-exchange reference rates from the
European Central Bank, pulled programmatically so I can reuse them — not
copied by hand off a webpage.

Start from the ECB's euro reference rates page:

    https://www.ecb.europa.eu/stats/eurofxref/eurofxref-graph-usd.en.html

(or the ECB stats site generally). The ECB publishes these rates as a
machine-readable feed that the human pages are built from, but the feed URL
isn't obvious from the page text — you'll need to find it. Use that feed (not
by scraping the rendered HTML table) to get, for the latest published day:

- the reference date the rates are published for,
- the EUR->USD, EUR->JPY, and EUR->GBP reference rates,
- and, as a derived check, the USD->JPY cross rate implied by the EUR rates.

Save your findings to `/tmp_workspace/results/ecb_fx.json` (the date, the
three EUR rates, and the derived USD/JPY cross), and save the exact feed URL
you called plus its raw response to `/tmp_workspace/results/ecb_evidence/` so
the pull is reproducible. A short note on how you discovered the feed is
welcome.
